calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Set For Case Management Conference On Sep-09-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Plaintiff Jose Daniel Aguilar in pro per.
Charles Collins, Esq. for Defendants.

Plaintiff states that there was some confusion and he was not able to submit and file an opposition.
Defense counsel objects to a hearing for lack of notice.

The Court having considered defense counsel's argument, adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT QUANG NGUYEN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare an order in accordance with CCP 437c(g).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar May-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare an order in accordance with CCP 437c(g).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS QUANG TRI NGUYEN AND JULIA LAM'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Charles Collins (415.3558.0310) for defendants and moving parties; Jose Daniel Aguilar (415.559.2307) plaintiff and opposing party appearing in propria persona.

Mr. Collins informs the court that an amended proof of service has been filed. Discussed and the court rules as follows: Granted with 20 days leave to amend. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Continued To Oct-15-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS QUANG TRI NGUYEN AND JULIA LAM'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearances: Jose Daniel Aguilar (415.595.2307) plaintiff and opposing party appearing in propria persona; Charles M. Collins (415.355.0310) for defendants and moving parties.

Mr. Collins makes an oral request to continue the matter to file an amended proof of service. Discussed. The matter is continued to October 15, 2025 on agreement of the parties. Mr. Collins to give notice. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
